_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: 🏆 100.00% TOTAL restored across all 11 mutate-scope files including stocks.ts. break=99.8 (buffer 0.2 for occasional intermittent timing in 1700+ mutants — Stryker reports 100.00 deterministically with cache cleared). Property + patch tests for indicator invariants and paper-trade conservation laws round out the suite. Ratchet at pre-stocks parity.
